message:
perf: replace Proxy get trap with Object.defineProperty accessors

- Object reads/writes now use defineProperty getters/setters with
  captured entry indices — V8 can optimize with hidden classes
- No findEntry linear scan on read/write (index captured in closure)
- Proxy kept only for new-key interception (no get trap)
- Rename .materialize() → .toJS() for idiomatic JS API
- 5-7x faster reads/writes across all benchmarks
